description_long: This is a wooden multi-drawer unit with three stacked drawers, each partially open to reveal several reddish-brown books or folders inside. The top surface features a block with two sculpted hand-like forms, one of which holds a blue patterned cloth, and a large knife stabbed into a notepad or paper. The wood grain is dark and rich, with lighter tones on the drawer interiors and sides. The drawers are handleless, relying on recessed fronts for opening. The overall construction appears sturdy and functional, with a slightly artistic or whimsical touch due to the hand sculptures and knife. This object would likely be found in an urban workshop, garage, or creative studio setting.
description: A dark wooden multi-drawer unit with three open drawers containing books or folders, topped with sculpted hands, a blue cloth, and a knife stabbed into a notepad.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered drawers, the sculpted hands, blue cloth, and knife on top, with the drawer interiors partially visible.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying all three drawers open, revealing reddish-brown books or folders, and a clear look at the top surface details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the open drawers and the sculpted hands and knife from a different angle, with drawer contents visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain wooden back of the unit and the top surface with the knife, notepad, and sculpted hands visible.
